identifier.description: Raw identifier: ANI/phone (E.164 or national), email, or account number. Normalized server-side, so an unencoded '+' is tolerated.

action.description: place (order an offer) | send-confirmation (email the confirmation)

target.description: For place: the offer_id from get-offers. For send-confirmation: the order_id returned by place.

params.description: Optional JSON object as a string. Leave empty.

ok.description: True when the action succeeded. False means nothing was ordered or sent.

order_id.description: The order's id. After 'place', pass this to 'send-confirmation' as target.

status.description: Order state: placed, confirmed or cancelled.

eta_text.description: When the customer can expect it, in plain English. Safe to say as-is.

sent_to_masked.description: Masked address the confirmation went to, e.g. 'a••••@example.net'. Use it to confirm where it went without reciting the full address.

message_ref.description: Reference for the confirmation message, if the customer asks.

result_summary.description: Plain-English description of what happened, safe to paraphrase. On failure, why it did not run.
